value.found_quote: CLAUDE.md files are markdown files that give Claude persistent instructions for a project, your personal workflow, or your entire organization. You write these files in plain text; Claude reads them at the start of every session.
value.rationale: The page directly describes CLAUDE.md as markdown files written by the user to give Claude persistent instructions/project context, loaded at the start of every session. This matches the claim. The page also notes they are "loaded at the start of every conversation." The claim's "surviving compaction" aspect isn't explicitly addressed, but the core offering is clearly described as a current, active feature.
